patch:
@@ -2,6 +2,8 @@
 
 > **AI Handoff Protocol**: AI-to-AI dispatch packets (Planner / Executor / Reviewer with human arbitration) follow the append-only governance protocol in [`ai_handoffs/AI_HANDOFF_PROTOCOL.md`](ai_handoffs/AI_HANDOFF_PROTOCOL.md). Templates: [`ai_handoffs/templates/`](ai_handoffs/templates/). The protocol is now also runtime-automated: `Invoke-AiDispatchLoop.ps1` orchestrates one bounded dispatch (Codex plans / Claude executes / Codex controls, with Claude's `GATE_VERDICT` plan-gate marker and `EXEC_STATUS` / `EXEC_PACKET` execute markers driving control flow), and `Invoke-AiDispatchQueue.ps1` is the GitHub issue queue runner — it pulls the oldest open `ai-dispatch`-labelled issue, runs it through the loop on a per-issue `ai-dispatch/ISSUE-<n>` branch, writes a timestamped `ai_dispatch_logs/log_*.md` audit file, and auto-publishes only when the loop exits 0 and Codex control says `pass`; failed or blocked runs remain local and are labelled failed. The recurring `/loop` queue cadence is semi-attended and bound to the local authenticated CLI session, not a headless cloud daemon — see [`AI_DISPATCH_AUTOMATION.md`](AI_DISPATCH_AUTOMATION.md). The packets themselves remain a documentation convention, not a replacement for ADRs / `Status.md` / `HANDOFF.md` / `change.md`. Precedent files at the repo root (`OPENAItoCLAUDE_*.md`, `CLAUDEtoOPENAI_*.md`, `CLAUDE_SUB_EPSILON_REVIEW.md`) remain valid historical records and are not migrated.
 
+> **Snapshot**: 2026-06-01 (SAVEAS-STATUS-SNAPSHOT — Save-As to a NEW `.rge-project` tree landed (#283 substrate + #284 wiring); forward-only follow-up to the STATUS-DOC-OPENSAVE-RECONCILE snapshot below). That snapshot (and the `plans/BASELINE.md` 2026-06-01 "Editor-usability preflight" subsection) recorded **Save-As to a *new* `.rge-project` tree** as still **carried/deferred** — accurate as of its grounding (`f76e001`), now superseded. **Shipped, grounded at `a74e479`:** substrate `rge_scene_loader::save_world_as_new_project` (creates `<dir>/.rge-project` + `<dir>/scenes/main.rge-scene` from the live world; folder-derived manifest `name`, `V0_1_0`, `[Desktop]`, `scenes: ["scenes/main.rge-scene"]`; **no-clobber** if either path exists; round-trips via `load_scene_world_from_path`; #283) + wiring **`Ctrl+Shift+S`** = `EditorKeyCommand::SaveAsProject` → `EditorShell::handle_save_as_new_project_request` over binary-owned `NewProjectSaveDialog` (rfd `pick_folder`) + `NewProjectSaveHook`, adopting `SaveSource::Project { path, name: folder-derived (None if non-UTF-8) }` + mark-saved (#284). editor-shell stayed loader-free (`forbidden-dep` rule 7). **The editor now has the full authoring loop: Open (Ctrl+O) / Save (Ctrl+S — scene or project, silent) / Save-As new project (Ctrl+Shift+S).** **Still open — NOT closed here:** menu-entry wiring for Save-As (no functional `MenuRegistry::resolve` dispatch); a last-directory-memory dialog; non-empty-folder confirmation; the non-Open/Save audit gaps (drag-drop, `io-image`, World-only Command-Bus `Action` context) stay as the 2026-05-28 ISSUE-256 entry records. **Forward-only:** the P2 snapshot below + every prior snapshot + the 2026-05-11 one-page summary pillars are byte-identical; this prepends the Save-As update only.
+
 > **Snapshot**: 2026-06-01 (STATUS-DOC-OPENSAVE-RECONCILE — editor in-app Open/Save surface (#264–#281) forward-only reconciliation, IMPLEMENTED via the `ai_handoffs/` manual dispatch protocol — TASK → EXEC → REVIEW → CLOSEOUT). The in-app file **Open/Save** authoring loop shipped across the contiguous PR run **#264–#281** but never reached these state docs (last reconciled at ISSUE-256 / `7472467`, before #264), which still framed **SAVE as "no path at all"** and **in-app Open as "absent."** Both are now stale. **Now shipped, grounded at `f76e001`:** in-app **Ctrl+O** scene Open (`crates/editor-shell/src/lifecycle/open_request.rs::handle_open_request`, #266) over the `EditorShell::replace_world` world-swap (`crates/editor-shell/src/lifecycle/mod.rs:753`, #265) and the scene-path resolver promoted into `rge-scene-loader` (#264), with GLB-watcher teardown; **Ctrl+S** Save / Save-As (#268) writing `.rge-scene` (`rge_scene_loader::save_scene_world_to_path`, #267) and `.rge-project` (`save_project_world_to_path`, #273); **true Save** = silent overwrite of the opened source routed by `SaveSource` { Scene, Project } (`crates/editor-shell/src/lifecycle/save_source.rs`, #269 / #274, replacing `scene_source_path`); window title (#270) + bottom status bar (#271) + source-neutral status (`source_name` / "No file", #277); `SaveSource::display_name()` shows a project's manifest name, folder as fallback (#275 / #279, tests+prose #281); `MarkSaved`→`Save` rename (#278); `editor-shell` kept loader-free by `forbidden-dep` rule 7 + `editor-state-ownership` Part B revived (#280). **Still open — NOT closed here:** Save-As to a *new* `.rge-project` tree (carried/deferred); and the non-Open/Save audit gaps — menu-command execution, drag-drop, `io-image`, World-only Command-Bus `Action` context — stay exactly as the 2026-05-28 ISSUE-256 entry records. **Forward-only:** the 2026-05-11-grounded one-page summary pillars and every prior snapshot are byte-identical; this adds the Open/Save surface only. Detail: the `plans/BASELINE.md` "Editor-usability preflight (Phase 9)" 2026-06-01 subsection.
 
 > **Snapshot**: 2026-05-28 (ISSUE-256 planning-substrate hygiene — Phase 9 Editor-usability preflight forward-only reconciliation, IMPLEMENTED via the `ai_handoffs/` dispatch protocol — orchestrator semantics per `AI_DISPATCH_AUTOMATION.md`). Reconciles the now-substantially-stale Phase 9 Editor-usability findings recorded in the dated 2026-05-21 "initial editor-usability adoption snapshot" subsection of `plans/BASELINE.md` (the Top-3-gaps + revisit-trigger current-state claims at `:586-620`) so the next Phase 9 audit does not rediscover the 2026-05-21 "structurally unreachable from the editor UI" / "defer all user-facing editor wire-up dispatches" claims as current. Grounded in the correction-loop-verified audit `ai_handoffs/ISSUE-254_EXEC_2026-05-28_23-49-37+0300.md` (passed Codex control after two CORRECT rounds); every closure-evidence citation was re-confirmed against current source at main commit `6e24706` for this reconciliation. Supersedes the abandoned ISSUE-253 (control-blocked, closed not-planned), whose "Gap 2 UNCHANGED" premise extrapolated from the dated text instead of reading source. **Headline current reality (grounded at `6e24706`)**: load paths exist (`--glb` dispatch G at `editor/rge-editor/src/main.rs:971-1026` → `import_glb` `:612`; `--scene` ISSUE-225 at `main.rs:912-968`, deps `editor/rge-editor/Cargo.toml:29,36-38`) and `--scene` renders a visible egui-dock window (ISSUE-249; `crates/editor-shell/src/render_path.rs:279-285` / `:313-328` / `:510-610`); six Ctrl-bound keyboard commands route through the CommandBus (`crates/editor-shell/src/lifecycle/commands.rs:280` + undo `:291` / redo `:302` / mark_saved `:309`, reached from `crates/editor-shell/src/lifecycle/mod.rs:1676`) and two plain-key playback commands (Space / Escape) through the PIE PlayState (`crates/editor-shell/src/lifecycle/playback.rs:110-123` + `:156-188`); SAVE direction absent; bus `Action` context still World-only (`crates/editor-actions/src/action.rs:87`, unchanged); MenuRegistry / `io-image` / drag-drop absent. **Gap re-classification**: Gap 1 (`:588`) PARTIALLY STALE (load wired, save absent); Gap 2 (`:590`) SUBSTANTIALLY CLOSED (keyboard-to-bus wired; catch-all moved to `mod.rs:1725` downstream of the real arm at `:1676`; residual narrower gap = World-only `Action` context); Gap 3 (`:592`) PARTIALLY STALE (`io-gltf` wired; MenuRegistry — only a doc-comment cross-reference at `crates/editor-shell/src/play_toolbar.rs:12`, functional searches zero — / `io-image` / drag-drop absent). **Revisit triggers (`:615-620`)**: Trigger 2 FIRED (Space/Escape PIE keybindings); Trigger 1 AMBIGUOUS (implementation landed, formal design artifact absent); the World-only posture is IMPLICIT-VIA-SHIPPED-CODE (`action.rs:87`), not a documented decision; the `:620` deferral guidance is no longer in force. **Phantom-reference callout**: the "CommandBus integration design preflight (decided the bus stays World-only)" cross-reference points to a section that does not exist; corrected by acknowledgment (state is implicit-via-code), explicitly NOT by authoring the missing artifact. **Still-open gaps recorded (audit §4 Gaps 4-10)**: save-direction absent; menu-command execution absent; drag-drop absent; `io-image` unused; non-CLI open/load UX absent; bus coverage keyboard-shaped not CAD-shaped; the `"tab/inspector"` spawner still registers `PlaceholderTabBody` (`crates/editor-ui/src/dock/spawner_registry.rs:165-168`), the inspector rendering via the host-internal `TabBody::Inspector`. **What this snapshot does NOT change**: the dated 2026-05-21 subsection (`:561-639` pre-edit) is preserved byte-identical — reconciliation is by prepending a new dated subsection above `:561`, not by in-place edit; no other `plans/BASELINE.md` subsection (W03, W04, W08, W10, 6.3, 13.2, Live-inspector wiring preflight) or the `:622-639` Notes/caveats block is touched; the `:573-582` workflows table and `:584` test-coverage paragraph are preserved as dated methodology history; older dated snapshots below stay verbatim. **What this snapshot does NOT introduce**: no Rust source / test / bench / fixture / Cargo / plan-doc-other-than-BASELINE.md / ADR / design note / "design preflight" section / architecture-lint / workflow / dispatch-automation edit; no new measurements, thresholds, or revisit triggers; NO standalone cargo commands outside `.ai/dispatch.verify.ps1`; NO `cargo bench`, no standalone `cargo test`, no fresh interactive editor run. **Scope envelope (this dispatch)**: planning-substrate docs only; allowed edits = `plans/BASELINE.md` (pure prepend) + `Status.md` + `HANDOFF.md` + `change.md` + this dispatch's own `ai_handoffs/ISSUE-256_*` packets and `ai_dispatch_logs/log_*ISSUE-256*.md`. Forward-only snapshot pattern matches ISSUE-243 / ISSUE-245 / ISSUE-251; ISSUE-249 and dispatch G are closure evidence, not snapshot precedent. **Three required references present**: `plans/BASELINE.md` new "2026-05-28  Editor-usability preflight reconciliation (post-ISSUE-225 / dispatch-G / ISSUE-249 + Phase-9 keyboard wiring)" subsection, `ai_handoffs/ISSUE-254_EXEC_2026-05-28_23-49-37+0300.md` (the correction-loop-verified audit this reconciliation records), and `ai_handoffs/ISSUE-256_TASK_2026-05-29_02-22-24+0300.md`.

+### 2026-06-01 — Save-As to a NEW `.rge-project` tree landed (#283 substrate + #284 wiring)
+
+**Forward-only follow-up (SAVEAS-STATUS-SNAPSHOT).** The 2026-06-01 subsection below ("Editor Open/Save surface landed (#264–#281)") and its **Still-open** list recorded "Save-As to a *new* `.rge-project` tree (creating a fresh project directory) remains a carried/deferred item." That shipped; this prepend supersedes it. The subsection below is preserved **byte-identical** (no in-place rewrite). Grounded at main commit `a74e479`.
+
+**Now CLOSED — Save-As to a new project tree.** End-to-end:
+
+- **Substrate (#283 NEWPROJECT-SAVE-SUBSTRATE).** `rge_scene_loader::save_world_as_new_project(world, project_dir) -> Result<PathBuf, NewProjectWorldSaveError>` creates `<dir>/.rge-project` (manifest: folder-derived `name`, `V0_1_0`, `target_tiers: [Desktop]`, no plugins, `scenes: ["scenes/main.rge-scene"]`) + `<dir>/scenes/main.rge-scene` from the live world, returning the created `.rge-project`; **no-clobber** — errs if either path already exists. Round-trips through `load_scene_world_from_path`.
+- **Wiring (#284 NEWPROJECT-SAVE-WIRING).** **`Ctrl+Shift+S`** → `EditorKeyCommand::SaveAsProject` → `EditorShell::handle_save_as_new_project_request` over the binary-owned `NewProjectSaveDialog` (rfd `pick_folder`) + `NewProjectSaveHook` (over the substrate fn). On success **adopts** `SaveSource::Project { path: <created>, name: <folder-derived; None if non-UTF-8> }` and marks saved — so the next plain `Ctrl+S` overwrites it silently. PIE-gated; cancel / no-dialog / no-hook / hook-error all log + no-op. editor-shell stayed loader-free / rfd-free (`forbidden-dep` rule 7).
+
+The editor now supports the full authoring loop: **Open** (`Ctrl+O`), **Save** (`Ctrl+S` — `.rge-scene` or `.rge-project`, silent overwrite by `SaveSource`), and **Save-As to a new `.rge-project` tree** (`Ctrl+Shift+S`).
+
+**Still open — explicitly NOT closed here:**
+
+- **Menu-entry wiring for Save-As** — there is still no functional `MenuRegistry::resolve` dispatch (`Command::OpenFile` carries only a diagnostic id); Save-As is keyboard-only (`Ctrl+Shift+S`).
+- A last-directory-memory dialog; an in-app confirmation when the picked folder is non-empty.
+- The non-Open/Save audit gaps (drag-drop ingestion, `io-image` consumption, the World-only Command-Bus `Action` context) are **unchanged** — as the 2026-05-28 ISSUE-256 entry records.
+
+**Scope:** docs-only, forward-only. No source / test / `Cargo.toml` change; the 2026-06-01 (#264–#281) subsection and all earlier dated entries below are byte-identical.
+
